sys_script.name: CR State change on document upload
sys_script.sys_name: CR State change on document upload

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_df189efb93610710ae6879b877373c27
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_enno_change_re_0_change_requests</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="x_enno_change_re_0_change_requests">state=^EQ<item display_value="Classification" endquery="false" field="state" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>CR State change on document upload</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {
 
    gs.info('=== CR State Rule Started ===');
    gs.info('CR Number: ' + current.number);
    gs.info('CR Sys ID: ' + current.getUniqueValue());
    gs.info('Current State: ' + current.cr_state);
 
    // Only process Classification
    if (current.cr_state != '2') {
        gs.info('Not in Classification state');
        return;
    }
 
    var doc = new GlideRecord('dms_document');
 
    doc.addQuery(
        'x_enno_change_re_0_build_change',
        current.getUniqueValue()
    );
 
    doc.query();
 
    gs.info('Documents Found: ' + doc.getRowCount());
 
    if (doc.next()) {
 
        gs.info('Document Found: ' + doc.getDisplayValue());
 
        // Move to Impact Assessment
        current.cr_state = '3';
 
        gs.info('State changed to Impact Assessment');
    }
 
})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>raiees.masood</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-25 05:29:56</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>df189efb93610710ae6879b877373c27</sys_id><sys_mod_count>7</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CR State change on document upload</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Change Request Management" source="x_enno_change_re_0">d5efc11b2f250310ea050f0cbfa4e366</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Change Request Management">d5efc11b2f250310ea050f0cbfa4e366</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_df189efb93610710ae6879b877373c27</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>raiees.masood</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-25 07:58:18</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=df189efb93610710ae6879b877373c27"/></record_update>
sys_update_version.record_name: CR State change on document upload

sys_metadata_delete.sys_name: CR State change on document upload
